## Checklist

- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh` passes
- [ ] Agent files have `# Role:` and `**Model:**` headers (if adding/modifying agents)
- [ ] No `git reset --hard` without `# brocode-confirmed` guard
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (for non-trivial changes)
- [ ] One concern per PR
